name: Sigonia, the Unclaimed Desolation
description: Increases the wearer's CRIT Rate by 4%. When an enemy target gets defeated, the wearer's CRIT DMG increases by 4%, stacking up to 10 times.

pieces2.description: Increases the wearer's CRIT Rate by 4%.
